titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Home Economics Graduate School of Nutrition student records23-11-2780

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Home Economics Graduate School of Nutrition student records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Home Economics. Graduate School of Nutrition

did.abstract: Applications, grades, credits transferred, and letters of recommendation.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: On March 14, 1974 the Board of Trustees voted to abolish the Graduate School of Nutrition and the Department of Human Nutrition and Food in the College of Human Ecology and to establish the Division of Nutritional Sciences, an intercollege unit within the Colleges of Agriculture and Life Sciences and Human Ecology.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Applications, grades, credits transferred, and letters of recommendation.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Home Economics Graduate School of Nutrition student records, #23-11-2780. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to individual student records restricted to permission of student and office of origin during student's lifetime.

did.unittitle: Schwieger, Marjorie Louise (Mrs Jack E. Ross)
Serraon, Virginia Ulanday (Mrs Jose P. Claudio)
Wood, Betty Ellen (Mrs Alvin W. Ries)
Yang, Hui Lan (Mrs David H. Cheng)
